hyperedges.label: Game loop fixed_update pipeline: CA step → rigid update → ragdoll update → damage
Three render modes read the same Grid + EntityManager (single source of truth)
GpuRenderer trait unifies VulkanRenderer + GraphicsRenderer behind run_gpu_mode<R>() with identical event loops

nodes.label: Grid (250x250) source of truth
nodes.rationale: AI-observable, dual renderer, single state. No double buffer — Grid::next was removed.

nodes.label: GpuRenderer trait
nodes.rationale: Unifies VulkanRenderer and GraphicsRenderer behind generic run_gpu_mode<R>(). Both have identical event loops; only shader/instance format differs.

nodes.label: slope stepping convention
nodes.rationale: update_rigid_entity tries stepping up 1 cell before resolving X collision, enabling walking up slopes without jumping.

nodes.label: vector movement convention
nodes.rationale: Player::move_left/right sets velocity directly via set_horizontal_vel, no accumulation. stop_horizontal zeroes it. Jump is edge-triggered (press only, not held).

nodes.label: inline cell colors convention
nodes.rationale: Renderers read cell.fg/cell.bg directly, never lookup MaterialRegistry in render path. Registry is for physics properties only (density, solid, flammable, etc.). Cell::new() copies colors from MaterialRegistry at creation time.

nodes.label: UiLayer — non-destructive overlay
nodes.rationale: UI layer NEVER writes to grid, entities, or any game state. It reads state and renders visuals on top. This keeps the source of truth clean and AI-observable (pipe protocol exports world state, not UI state).

nodes.label: Multi-layer world architecture
nodes.rationale: World { layers: Vec<GridLayer> } — each layer is a separate grid updated by its own rules, with cross-layer interactions. Layers interact: fire heats temp layer → temp melts material → material releases gas.

nodes.label: AI pipe protocol (JSON stdin/stdout)
nodes.rationale: Any AI agent can connect, no vision needed. Exports world state, not UI state.

nodes.label: Per-cell color (reality layer)
nodes.rationale: Each Cell stores fg/bg inline, no registry lookup in render path.
